Configure and manage MCP servers

Usage:
  opendbx mcp [command]

Available Commands:
  add                     Add an MCP server
  add-from-claude-desktop Import MCP servers from Claude Desktop (Mac and WSL only)
  add-json                Add an MCP server (stdio or SSE) with a JSON string
  get                     Get details about an MCP server
  list                    List configured MCP servers
  remove                  Remove an MCP server
  reset-project-choices   Reset all approved/rejected project-scoped (.mcp.json) servers
  serve                   Start the opendbx MCP server

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for mcp

Global Flags:
  -d, --debug string        Enable debug mode with optional category filtering (e.g., "api,hooks" or "!1p,!file")
      --debug-file string   Write debug logs to a specific file path (implicitly enables debug mode)
      --verbose             Override verbose mode setting from config

Use "opendbx mcp [command] --help" for more information about a command.
